CStrings:
+ "\n[ahal_dsp] "
+ "\n[ahal_dsp] ADMMockDict::debug_summary_string\n"
+ "\n[ahal_dsp] ADMMockDict::debug_summary_string_from_ns\n"
+ " - debug_summary_string\n"
+ " - debug_summary_string_from_ns\n"
+ " [("
+ " dev:"
+ " device configurations listed:\n"
+ " frames)"
+ "#"
+ "%25s:%-5d  ADS::Device::Device_GetPropertyData: not enough space for the return value of kAudioDevicePropertyCrossDeviceMatchingID for the device"
+ "%25s:%-5d  ADS::Device::Device_SetPropertyData: kAudioObjectPropertyElementName is not settable unless kSupportsSettableElementName behavior is enabled"
+ "%25s:%-5d  ADS::Device::Device_SetPropertyData: wrong size for the data for kAudioObjectPropertyElementName"
+ "%25s:%-5d  ADS::Stream_GetPropertyData: not enough space for the return value of kAudioStreamPropertyLatency for the stream"
+ "%25s:%-5d  ADS_Device::GetPropertyData: not enough space for kAudioDevicePropertyMaximumIOFrameSize"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_Device::_GetPropertyData: bad property data size for kAudioDevicePropertyMaximumIOFrameSize"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_IOContext_InputGraph_StreamUtils::get_drift_correction_settings: sample rate conversion no longer enables drift correction by default [IOC: %u]"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_IOContext_Legacy_Impl::IOWorkLoopDeinit: %u %{public}s (%{public}s): stopping with error %d because the device and/or master engine are gone"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_IOContext_Legacy_Impl::IOWorkLoopInit: %u: starting without the device and/or master engine"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugIn::GetPropertyData: wrong size for callbacks"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugIn::SetPropertyData: wrong size for callbacks"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugIn::VerifyCastingExtensionDevice: Invalid transport type for media device extension"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::GetPropertyData: bad property data size for kAudioDevicePropertyCrossDeviceMatchingID"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::GetPropertyData: bad property data size for kAudioDevicePropertyIsSimulated"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::GetPropertyData: bad property data size for kAudioObjectPropertyElementName"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::GetPropertyData: not enough space for kAudioDevicePropertyMaximumIOFrameSize"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  --- calling driver"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  --- driver encountered error %d"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  --- driver returned"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  --- restarting IO"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  --- sending notifications"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  --->"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  <---"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::HandlePlugIn_RequestConfigChange: %{public}s  but nothing changed"
+ "%25s:%-5d  HALS_PlugInDevice::SetPropertyData: bad property data size for kAudioObjectPropertyElementName"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Invalid number of devices for media device extension plugin"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Invalid qualifier"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Non isolated device does not support this qualifier"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Simulator_GetIsolatedZeroTimeStamp: no place to put the host time"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Simulator_GetIsolatedZeroTimeStamp: no place to put the sample time"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Simulator_GetIsolatedZeroTimeStamp: no place to put the seed"
+ "%25s:%-5d  Simulator_GetIsolatedZeroTimeStamp: unknown device"
+ "%32s:%-5d %{public}s, start: %llu, duration: %llu, duration ms: %lf, fault address: %llX, fault pc: %llX, faulting TID: %llX, fault type: %llX, PID: %llX, Path: %{public}s\n"
+ "%32s:%-5d (Context ID: %d) Attempting to re-add an item to the internal stream list."
+ "%32s:%-5d (Context ID: %d) Unable to add to internal stream list, no device instance."
+ "%32s:%-5d (Context ID: %d) Unable to add to internal stream list, no owning engine."
+ "%32s:%-5d (Context ID: %d) Unable to add to internal stream list."
+ "%32s:%-5d (Context ID: %u) (%{private}s) Description specifies an out of range stream index (%u) for this device / engine (Agg Device ID: %u)(Device ID: %u)"
+ "%32s:%-5d ADS_Device::Device_HasProperty - kAudioDevicePropertyMaximumIOFrameSize called with scope=0x%x element=0x%x\n"
+ "%32s:%-5d Assertion Failed: %s IClientConfigurator instance unavailable (hint: it's required)."
+ "%32s:%-5d Assertion Failed: %s [ecref] Invalid device ID for this operation."
+ "%32s:%-5d Cannot assign device during this state."
+ "%32s:%-5d DSP_IsConsumingStreamDSPGraphParameters called with invalid selector"
+ "%32s:%-5d Do not use Per_Context_Output_DSP_Hosting."
